## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` — tooling/deps/CI

## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes (lint + tests)
- [ ] `docs/SDD.md` updated if this changes scope, architecture, data model, or page design
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets committed (checked `.env` is not staged)
